title: Shadows at the Pier
content: You meet the dealer at a quiet, rusted pier. He's twitchy, constantly checking the foggy water.||'Here's the deal, Detective,' he whispers. 'I have a shipment coming in—medical supplies, things the city doesn't want people like me to have. I need you to stand at the end of the pier. If the harbor patrol shows up, you flash your badge and tell them you're conducting a high-level surveillance operation. They won't ask questions.'||'Do this for me, and I'll give you everything I know about the people Vane was tracking. What do you say?'

choices.text: I don't cover for criminals. I'm leaving.
